---
page-layout: custom
css:
  - styles/homepage.css
listing:
  contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
  template: _templates/blog-listing.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  feed: true
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  id: blog-listing
---

{{< include _includes/_layout_start.qmd >}}

::: {#blog-listing}
:::

{{< include _includes/_layout_end.qmd >}}
